text.title: Accessibility Testing Process Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the report artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

list.pattern: Findings cover fewer than all four layers without a documented waiver.
AT findings cover only one screen reader.
severity not in {blocker, major, minor, informational}.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "audit-2026-0001", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "owner": "@ruslan", "scope": { "product": "Faion Web", "flows": [ "/signup", "/dashboard", "/checkout" ], "wcag_version": "2.2", "level": "AA" }, "findings": [ { "id": "f-001", "layer": "automated", "sc": "1.4.3", "severity": "major", "evidence_url": "https://artifacts/axe-001.json" }, { "id": "f-002", "layer": "manual-keyboard", "sc": "2.4.7", "severity": "blocker", "evidence_url": "https://artifacts/kb-clip.mp4" }, { "id": "f-003", "layer": "AT", "sr": "NVDA", "sc": "4.1.2", "severity": "major", "evidence_url": "https://artifacts/nvda.log" }, { "id": "f-004", "layer": "user-panel", "user_panel": true, "sc": "3.3.1", "severity": "blocker", "evidence_url": "https://artifacts/session-04.mp4" } ], "summary": "Four-layer audit on Faion Web \u2014 1 blocker (keyboard), 2 major (contrast + NVDA), 1 user-panel blocker (error recovery).", "verdict": "fail" }
example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
severity 'very-bad' not in enum; verdict 'in-progress' not in enum; missing artefact_id, version, last_reviewed, owner, scope; only one layer of findings; missing evidence_url.
